global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent logo, headline, and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting ClearLedger's financial tracking service with a free trial offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: A simple, modern logo featuring the text 'ClearLedger' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Circular graphic
elements.description: A small, solid circle in a muted color, placed centrally towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, large text stating 'Track every euro' with a smaller line below it saying 'No hidden fees', centered in the ad.
elements.text_content: Track every euro No hidden fees

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button with the text '€19.99 Try for free' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A rectangular shape with a light background color, positioned at the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with soft colors, ClearLedger logo, headline, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ClearLedger, Track every euro, No hidden fees, €19.99 Try for free
